description: A SYNC whose digest differs from the implementation's own root MUST trigger a counter-SYNC response

steps.comment: 0xDEADBEEFCAFEBABE is extremely unlikely to be the implementation's actual Merkle root.

When digests differ, the receiver MUST send its own SYNC in response (spec §SYNC). If digests somehow matched, the test would see silence and fail — acceptable because 0xDEADBEEFCAFEBABE matching is negligibly probable.
